content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

May 29, 2002

Michael Weatherford, President
Aptos/La Selva Fire Protection District
6934 Soquel Drive
Aptos, CA 95003

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-138

Dear Mr. Weatherford:

This letter confirms the receipt of your May 3, 2002 request for advice regarding a
Aptos/La Selva Fire Protection District board member. Under the provisions of California Code
of Regulations 18329(b)(8)(B), unless you are an authorized representative of Marilyn Ramos,
for whom you seek assistance, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your
questions or provide analysis. I enclose a copy of Regulation 18329 for your review. Also
enclosed for your information is a copy of the Ramos Advice Letter No. A-02-108. If you
believe a violation of the Political Reform Act has occurred, you may file a complaint (enclosed
is a complaint form).

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact the
Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Joan Giannetta
Legal Secretary

Enclosures

cc: Marilyn Ramos
